# Web History Dictionary Keys

**API Collection**

The key for accessing the web history items stored in a notification’s user information dictionary.

## Overview

This string is used as the key in the `userInfo` dictionary passed as the argument to the [doc://com.apple.webkit/documentation/WebKit/WebHistoryAllItemsRemovedNotification], [doc://com.apple.webkit/documentation/WebKit/WebHistoryItemsAddedNotification], and [doc://com.apple.webkit/documentation/WebKit/WebHistoryItemsRemovedNotification] notifications.

## Constants

- **WebHistoryItemsKey**: The key to access an array containing the added or removed web history items.
